error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Bad request error in Google Calendar node
symptom: When trying to create an event in Google Calendar, n8n throws a 'Bad request - please check your parameters' error.
root_cause: The error occurs when the parameters passed to the Google Calendar node are incorrectly formatted, such as including unnecessary spaces or characters that the API does not accept.
fix_steps: Open the Google Calendar node settings
Remove any unnecessary spaces or '=' signs
Save the workflow and try again
agent_instruction: Ensure that the parameters for the Google Calendar node are correctly formatted without extra spaces or characters.
